title: RBI Assigns Lead Bank Roles for Andhra Pradesh Districts of Polavaram & Markapuram
description:
RBI has designated Union Bank of India as the Lead Bank for Polavaram and Markapuram districts. The move ensures smooth banking coordination and financial inclusion in newly created districts.
The post RBI Assigns Lead Bank Roles for Andhra Pradesh Districts of Polavaram & Markapuram appeared first on TaxGuru.
